name: Portuguese Sweet Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning.
2. Combine the liquid ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Add the melted butter, beaten egg, and beaten egg yolk to the liquid mixture.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, sugar, salt, and yeast) to the bowl in the order listed, mixing until a dough forms.
5. Place the dough on a floured surface and knead until smooth.
6. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased bread pan.
7. Select "White Bread" setting on your bread machine or baking method.
8. Start the cycle and allow the bread to rise and bake according to the manufacturer's instructions.
